description: Measures how fast M2(P) converges to theoretical ST value as P increases

methodology.point_counting: Direct enumeration mod p for y^2 + h(x)y = f(x)
methodology.M2_computation: Mean of (a_p/sqrt(p))^2 over good primes up to P
methodology.M2_theory: Tabulated for USp(4) and SU(2)xSU(2); empirical median at P=997 for others
methodology.robustness: Also fit with P<=500 only to avoid fitting to the target
